home-hero-subtitle: Don’t guess — check before you post.
home-benefit-1: ✅ Pre-check any video, image, or audio
home-about-content: CheckReel is a product of AlWafir — experts in social media management, AI applications, and precision marketing. We help content creators pre-screen their videos, images, and audio for policy violations — saving time, protecting brand identity, and reducing bans or strikes.
dashboard-tagline: AI platform for content compliance verification
dashboard-intro: CheckReel protects your content before publishing — using smart analysis to help avoid bans, muting, or monetization loss. Scan your content for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube and more. 🚀 Upgrade to CheckReel+ to save checks, export results, and unlock higher limits.
dashboard-upload-note: 💡 Supported formats: mp4, jpg, png, mp3, wav, mov, webm, gif, aac, opus
dashboard-upgrade-note: 🚀 Upgrade to CheckReel+ to save your checks, speed up analysis, and unlock full access — $9.99/month
